lessons.topic: Dropping off and picking up kids at school - I'm here to pick up my son, which line do I go to
Talking to the teacher - how is my child doing, is she behaving, any homework
Parent teacher conference - what are his grades, how can I help at home, she needs to read more
Signing permission slips and school forms - field trip, lunch program, emergency contact
Calling the school when child is sick - my daughter is sick today, she won't be in school
Understanding report cards and grades - what does this grade mean, is she passing, needs improvement
Signing up for after school activities - soccer team, art class, how much does it cost
Talking to other parents at school events - which class is your child in, do you live nearby
Helping with homework even with limited English - can you show me an example, I don't understand this math
Meeting new neighbors - hi we just moved in, I'm from Vietnam, nice to meet you
Noise complaints nicely - could you please keep it down after 10, the music is very loud
Talking to the landlord about repairs - the sink is leaking, the AC is not working, when can you fix it
Asking about building rules - where do I put trash, is parking free, when is laundry room open
Borrowing things from neighbors - can I borrow a ladder, do you have jumper cables
Package delivery problems - did you get my package by mistake, someone stole my package
Small talk with neighbors - how's your garden, your dog is so cute, did you see the storm last night
Dealing with landlord about security deposit - I want my deposit back, what damage are you charging me for
HOA and community meeting English - when is the next meeting, I want to bring up parking issues
Getting a table and ordering food - table for two please, I'll have the chicken, what do you recommend
Asking about the menu - what is this dish, is it spicy, does it have seafood
Special dietary requests - no onion please, I'm allergic to shellfish, can you make it less spicy
Sending food back politely - this is cold, I ordered medium rare, this isn't what I ordered
Asking for the check and paying - can I get the check, can we split the bill, do you accept cash
Making a reservation - I'd like a reservation for Saturday at 7, party of 6, any outdoor seating
Ordering takeout and delivery - I want to place a takeout order, how long will it take, is there a delivery fee
Tipping and service at restaurants - the service was great, how much should I tip, is tip included
Complimenting food and asking for recipes - this is delicious, what spice is in this, can I get the recipe
